title: helianthus ciliaris
intro: Helianthus ciliaris, also known as the desert sunflower, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helianthus ciliaris include treating wounds, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
